requirement_topic.en: EMC and Radio-Module Scope for Connected Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: 联网逆变器的 EMC 与无线模块适用范围
requirement_topic.zht: 聯網逆變器的 EMC 與無線模組適用範圍

summary.en: Vietnam EMC obligations for a PV inverter depend on the exact product scope and any communications functions. A base power-conversion unit, a gateway-equipped inverter, and an inverter with embedded Wi-Fi, cellular, Bluetooth, or other radio modules may fall into different technical-regulation, conformity, labeling, or radio approval paths. Confirm the current Vietnam QCVN / MIC / project scope before relying on China EMC or radio reports.
summary.zh: 越南光伏逆变器 EMC 义务取决于确切产品范围及其通信功能。基础电力变换单元、带网关逆变器、嵌入 Wi-Fi、蜂窝、蓝牙或其他无线模块的逆变器，可能进入不同的技术法规、合格评定、标签或无线电批准路径。在依赖中国 EMC 或无线报告前，应确认现行越南 QCVN / MIC / 项目适用范围。
summary.zht: 越南光伏逆變器 EMC 義務取決於確切產品範圍及其通訊功能。基礎電力變換單元、帶閘道器逆變器、嵌入 Wi-Fi、蜂窩、藍牙或其他無線模組的逆變器，可能進入不同的技術法規、合格評定、標籤或無線電批准路徑。在依賴中國 EMC 或無線報告前，應確認現行越南 QCVN / MIC / 專案適用範圍。

standards_or_laws: Applicable Vietnam QCVN EMC technical regulations by product scope
Vietnam MIC radio equipment rules where intentional transmitters are included
Project EMC and power-quality specifications where imposed by owner or utility

summary.en: China-origin packages may include GB/T 17626 immunity reports, GB 17625 harmonic or flicker reports, SRRC approvals for radio modules, and CE EMC reports. These documents can support engineering review but do not automatically satisfy Vietnam QCVN, MIC, label, or project-specific acceptance requirements.
summary.zh: 中国产资料包可能包括 GB/T 17626 抗扰度报告、GB 17625 谐波或闪烁报告、无线模块 SRRC 核准和 CE EMC 报告。这些文件可支持工程审查，但不能自动满足越南 QCVN、MIC、标签或项目专用验收要求。
summary.zht: 中國產資料包可能包括 GB/T 17626 抗擾度報告、GB 17625 諧波或閃爍報告、無線模組 SRRC 核准和 CE EMC 報告。這些文件可支持工程審查，但不能自動滿足越南 QCVN、MIC、標籤或專案專用驗收要求。

gap.en: Classify each SKU separately. The gap is often in the communications variant, external gateway, antenna, firmware, label, user notice, and local representative evidence rather than the power stage alone. Prepare a Vietnam scope memo before import or project submission.
gap.zh: 应逐个 SKU 进行分类。差距通常存在于通信版本、外置网关、天线、固件、标签、用户提示和本地代表证据，而不只是功率级本身。进口或项目提交前应准备越南适用范围备忘录。
gap.zht: 應逐個 SKU 進行分類。差距通常存在於通訊版本、外置閘道器、天線、韌體、標籤、使用者提示和本地代表證據，而不只是功率級本身。進口或專案提交前應準備越南適用範圍備忘錄。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory only where the inverter, gateway, or radio module is in scope of Vietnam technical regulations, MIC radio rules, labeling rules, or project-specific EMC requirements.
mandatory_status.cn: Not transferable — Chinese EMC, SRRC, or CE EMC evidence does not automatically satisfy Vietnam conformity or project requirements.

source.publisher: Ministry of Information and Communications of Viet Nam (MIC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat EMC and radio-module compliance as a separate Vietnam scope check for each inverter SKU and communications configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将 EMC 和无线模块合规作为越南针对每个逆变器 SKU 及通信配置的单独适用范围检查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將 EMC 和無線模組合規作為越南針對每個逆變器 SKU 及通訊配置的單獨適用範圍檢查。
